scan_metadata.verdict: NO real AI/ML found. Zero neural networks, zero machine learning frameworks, zero training pipelines. What exists is traditional game AI (behavior trees, pathfinding, procedures) and a fascinating automated bot testing framework.

ai_ml_frameworks.verdict: ZERO matches for any AI/ML framework, neural network, or machine learning concept. The game contains no AI/ML technology whatsoever.

false_positives_explained.InertiaTensor: Physics engine inertia tensor, not ML tensor
false_positives_explained.weights: Animation blend weights (boneWeights, particleWeights, blendWeights), not neural network weights
false_positives_explained.checkpoint: Memory checkpoints (GetMemCheckPoint, SetMemCheckPoint), not ML training checkpoints
false_positives_explained.training: In-game training quests (burn_e02_training), not ML training
false_positives_explained.batch: DeferredComponentUpdate::TBatchCommand (ECS batching), AutomatedTesting::ExecuteBatchedConsoleCommands, not ML batch processing
false_positives_explained.reward: In-game rewards system (CPRewardInspectEvent, BGSGameplayReward, ClaimReward), not RL rewards
false_positives_explained.predict: Network prediction for multiplayer (NetPredictDeath, bPredictedKill, netpredictedvalue.cpp), not ML prediction
false_positives_explained.classify: String 'CLASSIFY' found once with no context - likely an enum value, not ML classification
false_positives_explained.cluster: BSClusterRenderer - GPU instanced rendering of geometry clusters, not ML clustering
false_positives_explained.transform: 3D math transforms (ColorTransform, SoundTransform, TransformGestureEvent), not ML transformers
false_positives_explained.embedding: No ML embeddings found - only 'NonLatentDeleteFunctor' and unrelated strings
false_positives_explained.generative: hkbBlenderGeneratorChild (Havok animation blending), not generative AI
false_positives_explained.D9gpt_F88GPt_FX9Gpt: Random hex-like data strings, not GPT references

automated_bot_testing.significance: MAJOR FIND - Complete automated player bot framework for QA testing

ExploreWorld.purpose: Bot that autonomously explores 24 named world locations, enters/exits interiors via doors

GatherLoot.purpose: Bot that pathfinds to containers and flora, loots them, clears inventory, repeats

GrindMonsters.purpose: Bot that finds random combat targets within range, pathfinds to them, fights them, refills ammo

NavigateMapMarkers.purpose: Bot that sequentially pathfinds to map markers with retry logic

PathfindToReference.purpose: Bot that pathfinds to a specific reference with retry logic

BabylonTest.purpose: Nuclear Winter (Babylon) battle royale bot - fires weapons, loots bags, moves toward storm zone center

DamageTest.purpose: Spawns creatures and weapons, measures damage per hit and hits-to-kill

Common.purpose: Distributes multiple bot clients across 24 world coordinates (CowToCell)

LoadTestQuests.purpose: Automated quest load testing - moves to locations and advances quest stages

SmokeTestQuests.purpose: Runs through 10 quest smoke tests sequentially

SimultaneousTestQuests.purpose: Distributes different quest tests across multiple bot clients simultaneously

GPUBenchFakePlayerScript.purpose: Fake player for GPU benchmarking - enables AI, moves to linked ref, disables AI

infrastructure_strings.GameplayAutomatedTesting: Singleton class managing automated test execution
infrastructure_strings.AutomatedTesting::ExecuteBatchedConsoleC: Batched console command execution for bots
infrastructure_strings.AutomatedTesting::RequestExecutionIndex: Assigns unique indices to bot clients
infrastructure_strings.AutomatedTesting::QuestAliasResponse: Returns quest alias data to bots
infrastructure_strings.bAutomatedTestEnableDebugLogging: Debug logging toggle for automated tests
infrastructure_strings.gameplayautomatedtesting.cpp: Source file for the automated testing system
infrastructure_strings.reliableautomatedtestmessages.h: Network messages for distributed bot testing

security_testing.CallRMIFuzzed: Fuzzes Remote Method Invocations with random/sequential/nefarious data
security_testing.CallRMITesting: Tests RMI calls with various patterns

random_variant_debug.esm_string: Debug keyword used to generate random variants
random_variant_debug.description: Debug tool for generating random item/creature variants

telemetry_framework.description: BCS telemetry framework with counters, gauges, and sample storage

heatmap.description: Single reference to 'Heatmap' string - likely a debug visualization tool

nuclear_winter_match_stats.description: Detailed match statistics tracking for Nuclear Winter (Babylon)

cgm_system.description: Custom Game Mode (CGM) - Fallout Worlds content delivery

bot_support.description: Nuclear Winter had bot player support
